title: What Is Antim Sanskar? The Complete Vedic Guide
excerpt: Antim Sanskar is the last of the sixteen Samskaras of Hindu life. This guide explains the scriptural basis, the rituals involved, and the spiritual meaning behind this most sacred ceremony.
author: Pandit Rameshwar Shastri

title: The 13-Day Mourning Period: A Day-by-Day Guide for Families
excerpt: A compassionate, practical guide to each of the 13 days of rituals following a Hindu death — what happens, why it matters, and how to prepare your family.
author: Antyesti Pandit Council

title: Asthi Visarjan: Choosing the Right Sacred River for Your Loved One
excerpt: Haridwar, Varanasi, Prayagraj, Gaya, or Rameswaram? Each sacred river holds different spiritual significance. This guide helps families make this important decision.
author: Pandit Arvind Kumar Mishra

title: Bengali Hindu Funeral Traditions: Ekodishtha Shraddha Explained
excerpt: Bengali funeral customs have unique elements not found in other traditions. This guide explains the Ekodishtha Shraddha, Shat Paka, and other Bengal-specific rituals.
author: Pandit Debashish Bhattacharya

title: Grief Through the Vedic Lens: How Hindu Philosophy Helps Us Mourn
excerpt: The Vedas and Upanishads offer a profound framework for understanding loss. This article explores how Hindu philosophy provides comfort and context in times of grief.
author: Dr. Meena Krishnaswamy

title: How to Arrange a Hindu Funeral from Abroad: A Guide for NRI Families
excerpt: When a loved one passes away in India and the family is abroad, the logistics can be overwhelming. This step-by-step guide helps NRI families navigate every aspect.
author: Antyesti Team
